provider.name: Sentinel Agent Services
provider.description: 4-in-1 agent toolkit: KV Store, Email Relay, PDF Generator, Vector Storage. Persistent memory and tools for autonomous AI agents.

services.name: KV Store Write
services.description: Write a key-value pair to persistent storage. First 100 writes free per wallet.

services.name: KV Store Read
services.description: Read a value by key from persistent storage.

services.name: Email Relay
services.description: Send an email to any address. Supports HTML body.

services.name: PDF Generator
services.description: Generate a PDF document from structured content.

services.name: Vector Store
services.description: Store a vector embedding with metadata. For RAG, semantic search, agent memory.

services.name: Vector Search
services.description: Query vectors by cosine similarity. Returns top-K nearest neighbors.

services.name: Vector Batch Store
services.description: Batch upsert multiple vectors at once.
